2026-05-01T20:01:38.2424772Z Post job cleanup.
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3327968Z [command]/usr/bin/git version
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3378621Z git version 2.53.0
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3434899Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/bff63c5e-8f3c-4a81-8928-39407694176c' before making global git config changes
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3438886Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3448971Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/SkiaSharp/SkiaSharp
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3481543Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3491110Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3532355Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3722953Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3728896Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3765212Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3949273Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3956381Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-05-01T20:01:38.3986506Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
